payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because that older memory is superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt only asks to explain recall behavior for the provided fixture; no new entity resolution or durable memory commit is needed.

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering behavior for Sam's affiliation memory.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected for recall because it represents the active/current memory indicating Sam is from Goldman.
mem_old was not returned because it is marked as superseded by newer memory and therefore is not current.

details: Explained that mem_old was filtered due to supersession.
Did not present superseded memory as current.
